ManagedDeviceMessage: This device is managed by your organization.
MacPermissionStaleHint: If toggling permissions doesn't work, remove the app using the '−' button in System Settings and re-add it.
AccessibilityPermissionDescription: Required to remote control your device.
ScreenCapturePermissionDescription: Required to view your device's screen.
ScreenCastPermissionDescription: Required to capture and share your screen via XDG Desktop Portal.
RemoteControlPermissionDescription: Required for screen capture and input simulation via XDG Desktop Portal.
NotificationPermissionDescription: Required to show notifications and alerts.
RemoteControlSessionEndToastMessage: {0} has disconnected.  Screen sharing has ended.
RemoteControlSessionStartToastMessage: {0} has connected and is now sharing your screen.
NewChatMessageToastMessage: You have a new message from {0}.
ChatWindowClosedSystemMessage: System Message: User closed the chat window.
NoMessagesText: No messages yet. Send a message to start the conversation.
ChatSessionClosedToastMessage: The chat session has been closed by the remote user.
PermissionsMissingToastMessage: Required permissions are missing. Click here to enable.
MacAccessibilityPermissionRestartRequire: Application restart required before Accessibility permission can be requested.
MacScreenCapturePermissionRestartRequire: Application restart required before Screen Recording permission can be requested.
NoPermissionsRequired: No permissions are required for this operating system.
ConfirmDisconnect: Are you sure you want to disconnect this remote control session?
AboutSponsorDescription: ControlR is free, open-source, self-hostable, and powered by donations.
AboutThirdPartyLicensesDescription: ControlR uses the following open-source software and libraries.
UnhandledExceptionMessage: An unhandled exception occurred.  See the logs for details.
